violations.text: Dry ingredients scoop was stored on an unclean surface (top of the plastic container) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location, or utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The following equipment was observed in need of repair: - The faucet to the hand sink in the back rethermalizing area was observed to be loosely attached - The doors to the stacked 2 door hot hold cabinet were observed not sealing properly (warped/bent) - Faucets to hand sinks were observed to be leaking/dripping when not in use Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. (Maintenance personnel on site at time of inspection to address items in need of repair at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the back area paper towel dispensers were observed to have an accumulation of food residue and debris. Paper towel dispensers are to be maintained clean to prevent possible contamination of clean hands in the hand washing/drying process. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The floor/wall/coving tile under and behind the cookline area were observed in need of more frequent cleaning. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Kitchen area floor tile grout lines were observed to be warn and in need of repair. Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The tile grout lines in the back work areas were observed to be worn and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Tongs observed stored on an unclean surface (under hot hold station) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
The walk-in refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair (hardened/not sealing properly resulting in condensation build up on the floor). New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom shelving of the hot holding stations and the inside the refrigeration prep units have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

The floors in the following areas were observed: 1) Soil and other debris observed on the floors along the back prep/cook station and under the storage racks 2) Water pooling was observed under the soda fountain machine near the drive thru area The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
